programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is reluctantly persuaded to take Arthur with him to a basketball game in St Louis - but a delayed flight leaves them stranded in Pittsburgh

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug takes Deacon to lunch at a new cafe, but annoys the waitress so much she challenges him to a fight at the end of her shift. Meanwhile, Carrie invites Holly on a shopping trip - but only so she can use her van

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank has some anecdotes published in a magazine, sowing the seeds of grand writing ambitions. He approaches Ray's editor about becoming a columnist, but finds his way with words leaves a lot to be desired. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie decides 40 years of marriage to Frank is enough for any woman and moves in with Ray - to the delight of Robert, who enjoys being mothered by her. Debra is unhappy with the situation and tries to persuade her father-in-law to apologise, but he is enjoying the single life too much to agree

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's snooty parents announce they are going to pay a visit - much to the dismay of Ray, who pleads with Frank and Marie to be on their best behaviour and avoid embarrassing him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray ignores Frank's advice and loses all his cash in a poker game. Debra urges him to ask for the money back, but he is too proud to beg his father for help. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink lands a job as guest host on a morning TV show, and finds himself considering a permanent move from radio. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: To Thine Old Self Be True
programme.desc: Niles finds out that Maris has put on weight while pining for him, and Frasier throws a bachelor party for Donny - but ends up handcuffed to a stripper. Starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Bradley Riches, Dawn O'Porter, Adam Lambert, Louise Redknapp and Leila Farzad. With live music from soul singer Debbie

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob thirsts for revenge on Krusty the Clown, vowing to kill his former employer for erasing tapes of the first 10 years of their TV show, and hypnotises Bart to do the dirty deed for him. Featuring the guest voices of Kelsey Grammer and Gary Coleman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Milhouse, Nelson and Ralph are 'discovered' by record producer LT Smash and recruited as singers in a boy band, but Lisa begins to suspect the mogul's motives may not be entirely above board. Featuring the guest voices of 'N Sync

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Blackfriars in Inverness. After an afternoon of crafting, two guests note that quality is lacking in their room, leading to some very strong words

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Singer Marilyn and her mum Agnes host the second visit of the week at Bogenraith House in Aberdeenshire where they're hoping to hit the high notes, but Dean and Chelsie are in an unforgiving mood after their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Pamela hosts the third visit of the week at Cairngorms Glamping in Aberdeenshire where most of her guests are tickled pink by the pods but one pair aren't happy campers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Lovat Hotel in Perth. Sharmin and Sarah are used to tackling big jobs at their expansive 35-room hostelry, but one of their guests finds fault with the facilities. Tension between the B&Bers mounts during a visit to a museum, and the breakfast set-up confuses everyone and leaves Sharmin and Sarah with some difficult-to-swallow scores in their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's a feisty old payment day after a week packed to the gills with gripes. The tension is almost tangible as the scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer focus on the layout issues and dilemmas that many developers face in a very different world. In this episode, the duo tackle future-proofing, as in Clifford in West Yorkshire, Vic and Paul Miller need help with their idyllic property, as do the Lindleys from Ashtead in Surrey

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a couple who are converting a rusty ship's wheelhouse into head-turning accommodation for their Welsh glampsite. In Scotland, George revisits a designer who he met on the first series to see a pair of his gorgeous new eco-builds. He ends his Denmark trip at a modernist home and finally gets to reveal his own amazing space - a cabin in the sky, built on an old scissor lift

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Lee McKenzie presents action from the seventh round of the season at Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya in Spain. This is an inaugural grand prix by name, but the Spanish Grand Prix, which has now moved to Madrid, was held here last year. Oscar Piastri took the honours in that race 12 months ago, with his McLaren teammate Lando Norris taking second. With analysis from David Coulthard and Billy Monger

programme.title: Free Nelson Mandela
programme.desc: Documentary about the South African leader's 27-year imprisonment during the apartheid era, and how he led his country to democracy from inside a cell. The first episode begins in the early 1960s, when Nelson Mandela led the fightback against the South African government and was imprisoned for life. Soon, a global anti-apartheid movement is taking the struggle worldwide, particularly after the murder of activist Steve Biko

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics find a man experiencing a life-threatening diabetic hypoglycaemia. It takes the efforts of the fire service to reach the patient, and the only way is up a ladder and through an upstairs window. A woman with dangerously low oxygen levels is struggling to breathe, and sleepwalking may be the reason why an elderly woman has fallen and injured her side

programme.title: Boiling Point (2021)
programme.desc: A chef's life descends into chaos during one night at his fancy London restaurant as multiple personal and professional crises and a disastrous health inspection threaten to destroy everything he's worked for. Director Philip Barantini's drama, filmed in one continuous shot and which inspired the TV series. Starring Stephen Graham, Lauryn Ajufo, Vinette Robinson and Jason Flemyng

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Albie the Jack Russell puppy has a second chance of a home with 10-year-old George - provided he can win over George's mum and dad. Duchess, a bassett hound, expects to be treated like a queen and retired businesswoman June may be just the person to meet her requirements. Mistreated lurcher Sam seeks some home comforts. He needs Leeds couple Laura and Martin to see past his size and find a place for him in their hearts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Doctors discover Homer has had a crayon lodged in his brain since childhood and decide to remove it. The procedure instantly transforms him into a genius, but removes his ability to enjoy life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob thirsts for revenge on Krusty the Clown, vowing to kill his former employer for erasing tapes of the first 10 years of their TV show, and hypnotises Bart to do the dirty deed for him. Featuring the guest voices of Kelsey Grammer and Gary Coleman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Milhouse, Nelson and Ralph are 'discovered' by record producer LT Smash and recruited as singers in a boy band, but Lisa begins to suspect the mogul's motives may not be entirely above board. Featuring the guest voices of 'N Sync

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: With most of the house now built, Sarah and Graham focus their attentions on creating a family portrait wall. After taking a DNA test, Graham discovers some unexpected family history. Keen to transform 200 acres of grazing pasture into organic arable farmland, Sarah and Graham meet up with a local organic farmer to explore their options

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Mark Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff is surprised to receive an offer he cannot refuse - especially since it comes from a woman he reported to the mail authorities. John Ratzenberger stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam sells his Corvette and suffers the humiliating consequences, while inexperienced boss Norm commiserates when he too is humbled by the new crew he hires to help out his booming business. Ted Danson and George Wendt star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Lilith gives birth to the Cranes' first child, as the rest of the regulars celebrate the bar's 100th anniversary. Comedy, starring Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In a bid to outdo Marie's culinary skills, Debra goes against tradition by serving a fish dish on Thanksgiving. Not to be upstaged, her meddling mother-in-law turns up with a turkey. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ousted as captain of Nemo's basketball team, so Ray replaces him and begins devoting all his time to coaching - leading Debra to accuse him of neglecting the children

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray learns the autographed baseball he has treasured since his father gave it to him as a child is a forgery, and is so shocked that he decides to tell daughter Ally the truth about Father Christmas

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A classy restaurant awards the shrink a place on its wall of fame, but he takes exception to the caricature of himself and tries to persuade the head waiter to replace it with a more flattering likeness. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's brother turns up at the wedding, bringing nothing with him but an unquenchable thirst for alcohol and a squadron of drinking pals. Meanwhile, the bride finally becomes aware of Niles's feelings for her. Comedy, guest starring Anthony LaPaglia, with David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The shrink proffers romantic advice to both Niles and Daphne, hoping that they will admit their mutual affection. However, it remains to be seen whether they will have the nerve to be honest with each other before her impending marriage to Donny

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Daphne prepares to tie the knot with Donny, her family arrives for the wedding of the year and Niles struggles with his feelings for her

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz meet a man who had pieces on display in the Smithsonian, but find that what he has held on to is even more mind-blowing

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Live from Westminster with the latest news on the PM

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Lincolnshire where the embodiment of a once luxurious era awaits, a 1929 Rolls-Royce 'doctor's coupe'. When Emily's father died and left the car in her hands, she had no idea what to do with it and so this luxurious leviathan of a car ended up rotting away in her garage

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: An ex-Olympian and his wife take on the challenge of a derelict settlement in France, and a couple in Italy pick up the pieces after their village was devastated by an earthquake

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Charlene White in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton jets off to the Mar Menor on the east coast of Spain to help Mark and Gill. Spain is a very special place for them, as it was the first country they visited as a couple 12 years ago. With a budget of £60,000, they're hoping to find a two-bed apartment with some private outside space. Laura shows them five potentially suitable properties for them to choose between

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: On the Chesterfield Canal, a stained-glass artist works on a floating workshop Pod, while in Lincoln, Rob and Ade set off on a summer adventure across the network. Meanwhile, solo boater Stuart begins the long journey home from Hemel Hempstead to his marina near Devizes, and the Wakefield 45th Scouts set off on a waterways adventure on their own boat

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following adventurous British families as they buy and renovate beautiful chateaux in France. Donna and Paul have sold up at Château de Saugé and they're embarking on a huge new restoration project - a dilapidated five-storey Normandy water mill that needs a total overhaul. Meanwhile, at Château de Cézérac, Jon and Carmen are creating their dream bathroom

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Fun-loving Bedfordshire couple Kevin and Sarah are searching for a party pad in Almeria that's in the thick of the action, for a budget of 250,000 euros

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Invasion of the Parakeets
programme.desc: Ring-necked parakeets are among Britain's most divisive birds, loved for their beauty and blamed for harming native wildlife. Chris Packham follows a family of parakeets as they grow. He investigates claims that they steal nesting sites and damage crops, and asks whether these charismatic newcomers are ecological villains or unfairly targeted outsiders?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department. At Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham, a patient is rushed to Resus with multiple stab wounds to his chest and back. Also in Resus, 87-year-old Eunice is coughing up large amounts of blood, while 15-year-old Tyler is in A&E with his mum Claire after injuring his foot playing football

programme.title: Dolly: The World's Most Famous Sheep
programme.desc: The story of the cloned sheep that was the first mammal to be created from an adult cell, and the unassuming lab that changed scientific history, leading to press stampedes, presidential panic, protests and even a failed kidnapping plot. As Dolly blinked up at the cameras, the Roslin science team's sleepy lab became the centre of an ethical uproar

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department. At Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham, a patient is rushed to Resus with multiple stab wounds to his chest and back. Also in Resus, 87-year-old Eunice is coughing up large amounts of blood, while 15-year-old Tyler is in A&E with his mum Claire after injuring his foot playing football

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A head-on car accident in Cumbria leaves Nick's life hanging in the balance, East Anglian heli-meds land on a roundabout island to help Craig who has come off his motorbike and smashed headfirst into a signpost. Plus, medics battle extreme weather conditions to reach a man trapped under his JCB digger

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Ken navigates family visits and stress over fatherhood amidst rumours while supporting Gypsy through her pregnancy on the bayou

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.sub-title: I'll See You In Divorce Court
programme.desc: As divorce day approaches, Ryan tells Gypsy he misses her, but she shares the messages publicly with Bri to combat online hate

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Boiling Point (2021)
programme.desc: A chef's life descends into chaos during one night at his fancy London restaurant as multiple personal and professional crises and a disastrous health inspection threaten to destroy everything he's worked for. Director Philip Barantini's drama, filmed in one continuous shot and which inspired the TV series. Starring Stephen Graham, Lauryn Ajufo, Vinette Robinson and Jason Flemyng

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts
programme.desc: Jack Howard's short film nominated for the Iris Prize film award in 2025. A young waiter is confronted by a mysterious older woman on a rainy night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Loyal chauffeur Kabir wants the team to tell the life story of his boss, hard-working financier Mr Eblen Archer. Sam thinks it seems like such a heart-warming idea, until he realises there isn't much of a story to tell. However, Pat knows the rich and famous always have sordid secrets, so the team go in search of scandals their subject is involved in

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A couple become trapped in an underground cave, so Sam and his crew respond immediately to the national emergency by planning a movie that they can send down to lift their spirits. However, to complicate matters, an actual rescue team are also on site, who keep getting in the movie-makers' way - and who might just save the couple before the movie is finished. Offbeat comedy, written by and starring Sam Campbell

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton joins Joe Lycett to assess the wonders of Prague, capital of the Czech Republic. A kayak tour along the River Vltava allows them to take in the key sights, including the castle and the Charles Bridge. They then explore the work of sculptor David Cerný, whose controversial pieces adorn the city. Dinner is served at Levitate, where they eat their way through an 18-course tasting menu, including eating a sausage out of a skull and sampling caviar-laced ice-cream. On day two, the pair enjoy a beer spa before ascending the Zizkov TV Tower, for a bird's eye view of the city

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Ashford, Kent, francophiles Stephanie and Ian kick of the competition by serving French food from a home emulating the Palace of Versailles. The second night sees city slickers Louise and Dan attempt to secure their lead with spreadsheet organisation, before fun-loving couple Pippa and Lee make a bid for the prize with a mixture of fancy dress, stripping off, wacky voices and homely food

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart discovers a previously unknown comet while carrying out a punishment for Principal Skinner. Unfortunately, to the horror of all concerned, it is on a direct collision course with Springfield - and Flanders owns the only bomb shelter in town

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer enrols in clown college and begins impersonating Krusty, but trouble looms on the horizon as the showbiz prankster's underworld creditors come looking for the money he owes them. Featuring the guest voices of Joe Mantegna, Dick Cavett and Johnny Unitas

programme.desc: In a bid to outdo Marie's culinary skills, Debra goes against tradition by serving a fish dish on Thanksgiving. Not to be upstaged, her meddling mother-in-law turns up with a turkey. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ousted as captain of Nemo's basketball team, so Ray replaces him and begins devoting all his time to coaching - leading Debra to accuse him of neglecting the children

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray learns the autographed baseball he has treasured since his father gave it to him as a child is a forgery, and is so shocked that he decides to tell daughter Ally the truth about Father Christmas

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A classy restaurant awards the shrink a place on its wall of fame, but he takes exception to the caricature of himself and tries to persuade the head waiter to replace it with a more flattering likeness. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's brother turns up at the wedding, bringing nothing with him but an unquenchable thirst for alcohol and a squadron of drinking pals. Meanwhile, the bride finally becomes aware of Niles's feelings for her. Comedy, guest starring Anthony LaPaglia, with David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The shrink proffers romantic advice to both Niles and Daphne, hoping that they will admit their mutual affection. However, it remains to be seen whether they will have the nerve to be honest with each other before her impending marriage to Donny

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Something Borrowed, Someone Blue - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Daphne prepares to tie the knot with Donny, her family arrives for the wedding of the year and Niles struggles with his feelings for her

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz meet a man who had pieces on display in the Smithsonian, but find that what he has held on to is even more mind-blowing

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Live from Westminster with the latest news on the PM

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Lincolnshire where the embodiment of a once luxurious era awaits, a 1929 Rolls-Royce 'doctor's coupe'. When Emily's father died and left the car in her hands, she had no idea what to do with it and so this luxurious leviathan of a car ended up rotting away in her garage

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: An ex-Olympian and his wife take on the challenge of a derelict settlement in France, and a couple in Italy pick up the pieces after their village was devastated by an earthquake

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Charlene White in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton jets off to the Mar Menor on the east coast of Spain to help Mark and Gill. Spain is a very special place for them, as it was the first country they visited as a couple 12 years ago. With a budget of £60,000, they're hoping to find a two-bed apartment with some private outside space. Laura shows them five potentially suitable properties for them to choose between

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: On the Chesterfield Canal, a stained-glass artist works on a floating workshop Pod, while in Lincoln, Rob and Ade set off on a summer adventure across the network. Meanwhile, solo boater Stuart begins the long journey home from Hemel Hempstead to his marina near Devizes, and the Wakefield 45th Scouts set off on a waterways adventure on their own boat

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following adventurous British families as they buy and renovate beautiful chateaux in France. Donna and Paul have sold up at Château de Saugé and they're embarking on a huge new restoration project - a dilapidated five-storey Normandy water mill that needs a total overhaul. Meanwhile, at Château de Cézérac, Jon and Carmen are creating their dream bathroom

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Fun-loving Bedfordshire couple Kevin and Sarah are searching for a party pad in Almeria that's in the thick of the action, for a budget of 250,000 euros

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Invasion of the Parakeets
programme.desc: Ring-necked parakeets are among Britain's most divisive birds, loved for their beauty and blamed for harming native wildlife. Chris Packham follows a family of parakeets as they grow. He investigates claims that they steal nesting sites and damage crops, and asks whether these charismatic newcomers are ecological villains or unfairly targeted outsiders?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department. At Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham, a patient is rushed to Resus with multiple stab wounds to his chest and back. Also in Resus, 87-year-old Eunice is coughing up large amounts of blood, while 15-year-old Tyler is in A&E with his mum Claire after injuring his foot playing football

programme.title: Dolly: The World's Most Famous Sheep
programme.desc: The story of the cloned sheep that was the first mammal to be created from an adult cell, and the unassuming lab that changed scientific history, leading to press stampedes, presidential panic, protests and even a failed kidnapping plot. As Dolly blinked up at the cameras, the Roslin science team's sleepy lab became the centre of an ethical uproar

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics find a man experiencing a life-threatening diabetic hypoglycaemia. It takes the efforts of the fire service to reach the patient, and the only way is up a ladder and through an upstairs window. A woman with dangerously low oxygen levels is struggling to breathe, and sleepwalking may be the reason why an elderly woman has fallen and injured her side

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: At the Royal London Hospital, 56-year-old plasterer Lee is coming out of a medically induced coma, following a major car accident five days ago and several complex surgeries. Maurilio, a 43-year-old moped delivery driver, has collided with a car, he's rushed to St Mary's Major Trauma Centre as his son Kauan comes to terms with what's happened

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Ken navigates family visits and stress over fatherhood amidst rumours while supporting Gypsy through her pregnancy on the bayou

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.sub-title: I'll See You In Divorce Court
programme.desc: As divorce day approaches, Ryan tells Gypsy he misses her, but she shares the messages publicly with Bri to combat online hate

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the north Kent coast compete, with engaged Emma and Craig kicking things off with their menu of simple fare, but the starter isn't popular and there are issues with the dessert. Darren and Dan are next up and their food goes down a storm, while well-to-do Edward and Catherine conclude proceedings, hoping to impress with their grand house and fine dining. Who will take home the £1,000 prize money?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr. Teams captained by Jon Richardson and Sean Lock answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: Alan Carr Live: Spexy Beast
programme.desc: A performance from the comedian's 2011 tour, recorded in front of an audience of 13,000 fans at Manchester Arena. He tells tales of how becoming a TV personality has changed his life, discusses the perils of moving from Manchester to London, and recalls encounters with unusual guests on his talk show Chatty Man. He also shares stories of his less high-profile dramas, including the challenges involved in owning an eccentric dog

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.title: 3 Men and a Little Lady (1990)

programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sandra Dee's, a seafood and barbecue restaurant in desperate need of a renovation in Sacramento, California. His team have just 24 hours to refurbish the establishment, and Gordon creates an exciting new menu by incorporating existing dishes and elevating them to a higher standard. Will returning customers be impressed by the changes?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Trolley Stop Café, a classic Cajun-inspired restaurant in the heart of New Orleans, where things have gone badly off the rails. Gordon and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior with streetcar-inspired decor and revamp the menu, working around the clock with the café's staff, who must learn how to prepare the new dishes and work together as a team. The customers are invited to return the next day to judge the changes

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Shanty on 19th, an iconic restaurant in the West End theatre district of Allentown, Pennsylvania, which has been a local presence for decades. However, its future success is under threat unless Gordon and his team can return the place to its former glory. They have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior as a bright and airy contemporary bistro that pays homage to the industrial history of its hometown and recreate the menu, working around the clock with the staff, who must learn how to make the new dishes and work together more effectively. The customers are asked to come back the next day to see the improvements. Will they think the new eatery is a star in the making?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Vasi's Restaurant and Bar, a family-owned eatery in Waterbury, Connecticut, to implement some much-needed updates. He and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the dated interior at a seaside Mediterranean taverna that fuses Greek and Italian heritage, and refresh the menu, working around the clock with Vasi's staff, who must learn how to work together to prepare the new dishes. The customers are then invited to return the next day, assess the changes and pass judgment

programme.desc: Mitch and Jay each seek out a much-needed retreat from domestic life, but end up at the same resort, while Cam feels at a loose end and drops in on Gloria's to lend a hand

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay forces everyone to take a family holiday on a houseboat on a lake as he aims to create wonderful memories that will last long after he's gone. For the kids, life on the lake isn't quite as fun as they had hoped, while Mitchell runs into an old flame and Cam can't go in the sun. Phil and Claire try to make the most of their surroundings by trying out some rather adventurous excursions. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Maggie can't drop off to sleep, Homer tells her a bedtime story about a holiday to the Grand Canyon taken by the Simpsons and the Flanders. At first the two families are at odds, but when they get stranded, Homer and Ned must go for help and the clans begin to bond

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer promises Marge the trip of a lifetime, but is worried about the cost, so makes a deal with a travel agent to become a courier and transport a briefcase with top secret contents to Paris in exchange for a discounted family holiday. US chat show host Jay Leno guest stars

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isn't too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends' kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: Don't Tell the Bride: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Nick from Crawley, West Sussex, is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Rosie a winter wonderland wedding she will never forget - but has just three weeks to organise the ceremony

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: Don't Tell the Bride - Best Ever
programme.desc: Radio 1 DJ Scott Mills counts down the top 10 editions of the series, as voted for by viewers. In the running for the number one spot are a groom obsessed with sci-fi, a man who gambled on a Vegas wedding and a couple's WAG-style ceremony

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Sports-loving Brazilian Eduardo takes sole charge of organising his wedding to Polish fiance Paulina, knowing full well that if he gets any small detail wrong, she will not hold back and 'smash everything in her way'. With this in mind, he is under pressure is on to impress not only his bride-to-be but also all the guests

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jose Costa, the president of North Carolina-based automotive-care franchise Maaco, goes undercover to join his employees on the frontline, disguised as a food truck owner competing in a reality show. He wants to meet the staff who keep the firm on the road to success and find out whether his franchisees are following guidelines

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Rivera, the president of Phenix Salon Suites in Colorado Springs - a company that rents boutiques to hairdressers, nail technicians and beauty therapists - goes incognito to see first-hand what she needs to improve on and what makes her franchisees successful

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Sheffield, Ray and Chloe, reckon their French cuisine will help them bag the money, but they're in for a rocky ride. On day two, Andrew and Claire want to push the boat out for their first ever dinner party. However, criticism of their unusual menu causes Andrew to bite back, and things don't improve when he does his Mr Bean impressions. On the last night, food connoisseurs Rob and Emma plan a fine dining menu, but suffer a few unfortunate mishaps in the kitchen. It seems set to be a tight finish and remains unclear who will pocket the £1,000 prize right up to the announcement

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Young Brighton couple Hannah and Luke kick off the competition with an ambitiously trendy menu, then more experienced hosts Karen and Mark step up to the plate the next day, followed by Rachel and TJ, who have given nothing away to their fellow hosts

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Keen to impress with their cooking in Brighton is long-married couple David and Liz, newlyweds James and Paul, and loved-up Martin and Lorena. David and Liz are hoping that their twist on crowd-pleasers and their playful approach to entertaining will clinch the cash prize. Day two sees creative Paul and his husband James pull out all the stops to create a very personal evening. Last to host are love's young dream Martin and Lorena who are determined to outdo the rest by bringing the fiesta with a Spanish-themed evening

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Shanty on 19th, an iconic restaurant in the West End theatre district of Allentown, Pennsylvania, which has been a local presence for decades. However, its future success is under threat unless Gordon and his team can return the place to its former glory. They have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior as a bright and airy contemporary bistro that pays homage to the industrial history of its hometown and recreate the menu, working around the clock with the staff, who must learn how to make the new dishes and work together more effectively. The customers are asked to come back the next day to see the improvements. Will they think the new eatery is a star in the making?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Vasi's Restaurant and Bar, a family-owned eatery in Waterbury, Connecticut, to implement some much-needed updates. He and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the dated interior at a seaside Mediterranean taverna that fuses Greek and Italian heritage, and refresh the menu, working around the clock with Vasi's staff, who must learn how to work together to prepare the new dishes. The customers are then invited to return the next day, assess the changes and pass judgment

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Catfish Cabin in Memphis, Tennessee, which offers traditional, Southern-style delicacies but has waning staff morale that is causing problems. The acerbic chef and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the dark interior with sleek new furniture and fixtures, install a new kitchen and update the menu, working around the clock with Catfish Cabin's staff, who must learn how to function efficiently as a team and create the fresh dishes. The patrons are asked to come back the following day to assess the improvements

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Stone's Throw, a family-owned fine dining restaurant on the Housatonic River in Seymour, Connecticut, to help the stressed owners improve their business. He and his team have just 24 hours to redecorate the uninspiring interior, making it more welcoming with a fresh colour palette, and update the menu, working around the clock with the restaurant staff, who must learn how to prepare and serve the new dishes as a team. The customers are asked to return the next day and dine in the upgraded restaurant

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits Bayou on the Vine, a family-run Cajun restaurant in the redeveloped Jazz District of Kansas City, Missouri that is struggling with an uncertain future. He and his team have just 24 hours to re-imagine the premises with a jazz theme, giving it a more authentic colour scheme, and original decor that includes musical instruments and family photographs

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. It's the grand final, and at the end of this episode, one of our five fabulous competitors will walk away with a trophy that looks very little like Greg Davies tucked under their arm. But before that, Amy Gledhill literally tears her hair out, Armando Iannucci plays the recorder while riding a trike with a plunger on his head, Joel Dommett sniffs the contents of a vacuum, Kumail Nanjiani mistreats a beloved resident of the Taskmaster house and Joanna Page lays waste to Little Alex Horne. Plus: the greatest pillow fights of all time! Once the dust, lint, fur and feathers have settled from all of that, Greg, with great regality, announces his brand-new champion. Exec Prods: Alex Horne, Richard Allen-Turner, Rob Aslett, Andy Devonshire, James Taylor, Jon Thoday; Series Prod: Andy Cartwright; Series Dir: Andy Devonshire; Prod Co: AvalonShort: It's the final! programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: An LA auction brings more competition than the buyers were expecting, and Dave Hester returns despite his chequered history

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lovebirds Gabz and Pete kick off the competition in and around Nottingham by cooking the food they fell in love eating together. Guests Sushma and Gulab, who have been married for 21 years, offer amusing relationship advice accompanied by strong opinions on the food. On day two Sushma and Gulab's traditional Indian banquet goes down a storm, at least until a sweet milky pudding arrives. Finally, country-dwelling partners John and Shaun serve up a home-grown menu, but not everything is as locally sourced as they had hoped

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kicking off the competition in Edinburgh are young lovebirds Andy and Pim, who are hoping to impress their guests with a Scottish and Thai-themed menu - with a bit of American thrown in for good measure. On the second night, the group learns more about Jimmy and Jas's fairy-tale first encounter, as well as Jimmy's fledgling modelling career, which surprises everyone. Night three sees a bromance between Andy and Stuart blossom, and everyone needs an open mind when they sample plumber Stuart and hairdresser Jack's experimental menu

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Self-professed nerd Owen Walsh plans his big day, but while fiancee Lisa Toner dreams of an elegant lakeside wedding, he is thinking of a ceremony on the side of a mountain with his bride arriving on horseback, sporting a cape - just like the ladies in his favourite fantasy show Game of Thrones. However, as his budget grows tighter, his vision of a medieval spectacle looks less likely - will his ideal wedding end up being more a game of moans?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Ben organises the hair, make-up and the perfect wedding dress for his pregnant bride Celina, hoping his efforts to pull off a wedding in an Ikea store will be a success

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Recording artist Darius Rucker goes undercover to find America's next great musical act. Darius first gained fame as lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist of rock band Hootie & the Blowfish, selling over 16 million records and winning two Grammys. He then went on to have a successful solo career as a county music artist. Now Darius wants to find talented but undiscovered new music acts and help launch their careers, so dons a disguise to work at an open mic night, as a roadie and a busker in his efforts to locate fresh songwriting and performing talent

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Marcus Samuelsson goes undercover to find and mentor America's next great chef. An Ethiopian refugee adopted by a Swedish family, Marcus developed a deep love for cooking at an early age and has since become a renowned force in international cuisine, with over 30 restaurants worldwide. Marcus disguises himself to work incognito in a teaching kitchen, a food truck business, a culinary institute and a soup kitchen, as he searches for undiscovered chefs to mentor

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Wichita, Kansas, where he tries to revitalise Fetch Bistro, which offers diners a place to eat alongside their canine companions. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to update the interior and pare down the menu and teach the staff the new dishes. They plan a pared-down menu featuring new dishes and a more consistent approach, with their customers asked to come back the next day to assess the changes. What will they think of the improvements to the restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: In Hermosa Beach, California, Gordon Ramsay visits Patrick Molloy's, a family-owned Irish pub. Gordon and his team have just 24 hours to completely strip out and refurbish the dining room, giving it a new, open floor plan, modern lighting and cohesive decor. They create a simplified and delicious menu, working around the clock to give Patrick's staff the face-to-face training and extra confidence they need. The patrons are asked to return the following day to sample the food and see the improvements

programme.desc: Adam and Jonny arrive at Mum and Dad's house with big news to announce - they both have girlfriends. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents' relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge experiences mixed emotions when she is forced to replace the family car after an encounter with a sinkhole, while Bart becomes interested in Lisa's extracurricular activities after finding out about her covert meetings in town. With the guest voice of stock car racer Jeff Gordon

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probe's return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 45-year-old twice-divorced Nicola, who is hoping one of the six naked men behind the screens has what it takes to be husband number three. Second up is Mark from London, who has Crohn's disease and hopes to regain some body confidence on the show

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Another naked newbie arrives, creating a huge test for one couple. Meanwhile, the daters without strong connections are also feeling vulnerable, leading to a jaw-dropping double dumping. Hosted by Rylan Clark

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An omnibus edition of the two part-special for Stand Up to Cancer first shown in November 2023. Bob Mortimer and Richard Ayoade hit the sofa with Jennifer Saunders and Beattie Edmondson. And actors Stephen Graham and Hannah Walters tune in with their children Grace and Alfie. They watch The Great British Bake Off, Survivor, Planet Earth III, Made in Chelsea, No One Will Save You, Teen First Dates, and Harry and Elizabeth's Stand Up To Cancer stories

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 45-year-old twice-divorced Nicola, who is hoping one of the six naked men behind the screens has what it takes to be husband number three. Second up is Mark from London, who has Crohn's disease and hopes to regain some body confidence on the show

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly has difficulty accepting her son has such deep emotions at his tender age. Problems ensue when Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch American football with Lainey's father. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray takes Erica's car privileges away, she and Barry buy a shabby second-hand van to get back at him. Meanwhile, when Adam objects to being voted 'nicest guy' in the school yearbook, he gets a suspension

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the film Ferris Bueller's Day Off, Barry pretends to be ill so that he can avoid school and create an epic day of his own. However, his plans go awry when Adam has exactly the same idea. Charlie Sheen guest stars

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand, and Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work. A resident chooses forgiveness, Jack pleads with Beth, and things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone's happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and panic strikes a dad

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from east London compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Stephen and Andrew who present a cosy menu inspired by their love of all things homely. Also vying to win are beauty-lovers Rob and Abi who hope to impress their guests by cooking up some glamorous cuisine, before comedian duo James and Kate hope a surprise performance will help them secure the cash

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in at the 90-year-old Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, where owner Phillip Lovingfoss has an apparent liking for alcohol that some of his staff claim is threatening to destroy the business. The challenge of turning around the hotel's fortunes only increases when the chef sees shocking allegations about Phillip splashed all over the front page of the local newspaper

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: In Oregon, Gordon Ramsay tries to rescue the Applegate River Lodge, which is around $1million in debt. The chef questions whether owner Richard Davis's interest in smoking cannabis is distracting him from the problems at this family-built inn, and encounters Richard's sons Duke and Dusty, whose fiery relationship seems to prevent them from working together to tackle the establishment's financial troubles

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: A huge change in the crew rocks the boat. A flirty love triangle heats up. And chef Josh struggles to cater to some very particular vegan guests

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tuckers board the train for an eventful journey to Dede's wedding. Claire and Mitchell work on their speech, Phil and Cam are starstruck when they spot their favourite author on the train, Manny and Luke go girl crazy and Gloria finds herself stuck in a frustrating situation. Meanwhile, Jay seems delighted that Dede has moved on for good, but could his overenthusiasm come back to bite him?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to find the right moment to sack an employee, while Phil catches Luke in a compromising position at home and everyone fails to notice that Alex has moved back for the summer. Elsewhere, Jay refuses to accept that finding a job again might be harder than he thought and Lily gets caught in the middle when Cameron and Mitch decide to spend the summer apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip down memory lane is on the cards when Homer finds an old film strip, leading to family flashbacks telling the story of Bart and Lisa's troublesome toddler years - and how they got into their first fight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family hears about Grampa's time in the Air Force, and when Milhouse's Dutch cousin Annika pops by, Bart takes up smoking to impress her. Featuring the guest voice of Game of Thrones' Carice van Houten

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a modernised Springfield Elementary School has a technical meltdown, Lisa does her best to transform it into a different institution. During the process, Groundskeeper Willie coaches her and the other members of the Mathlympics team for an important maths quiz against their Waverly Hill rivals

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. Boyle partners up with Hitchcock and Scull to solve a tough case, while Jeffords lies to Gina claiming he and Holt attended her dance troupe's performance. Chris Parnell guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The day of Frank's 1920s-themed wedding arrives and Phil asks the Dunphys to get into the spirit by wearing costumes, while Cam gets a surprise when he finally stands up to Pam

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria, Claire, Haley, Alex, Lily, Luke and Manny find different ways to show support for the women's movement, while a car park causes a major disagreement between Jay and Phil

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Jay each seek out a much-needed retreat from domestic life, but end up at the same resort, while Cam feels at a loose end and drops in on Gloria's to lend a hand

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay forces everyone to take a family holiday on a houseboat on a lake as he aims to create wonderful memories that will last long after he's gone. For the kids, life on the lake isn't quite as fun as they had hoped, while Mitchell runs into an old flame and Cam can't go in the sun. Phil and Claire try to make the most of their surroundings by trying out some rather adventurous excursions. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Maggie can't drop off to sleep, Homer tells her a bedtime story about a holiday to the Grand Canyon taken by the Simpsons and the Flanders. At first the two families are at odds, but when they get stranded, Homer and Ned must go for help and the clans begin to bond

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer promises Marge the trip of a lifetime, but is worried about the cost, so makes a deal with a travel agent to become a courier and transport a briefcase with top secret contents to Paris in exchange for a discounted family holiday. US chat show host Jay Leno guest stars

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone is happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and one dad panics

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Frankie uses Beth's secret to her advantage. Jenson is left with a big decision to make when Warren needs his help. And a teen continues down a dark path

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isn't too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends' kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when bad weather rolls in out of nowhere, and the dynamic in the crew shifts when one member takes on a new role. Jealousy abounds when a romance heats up on board, and there's a tearful breakup

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Banged Up: Stars Behind Bars, Planet Earth, Culprits, The Curse of Robert the Doll and Little Trains and Big Names with Pete Waterman. From November 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Crown, Survivor, 007: Road to a Million, The Good Ship Murder, Shoplifters: Caught Red Handed and ITV News' coverage of the Cabinet reshuffle. From November 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson meets 21-year-old YouTuber Jay from London, who has no problem messaging women online but cannot make connections in real life, and 28-year-old Victoria from Liverpool, who is looking for her very own Xena, Warrior Princess. Will the back-to-basics approach of Naked Attraction help either of them find what they're looking for?

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: There is new competition for the girls, who are left fretting by the arrival of three-time Miss Wales, Joey. Dom and Mike start moving on from the past. Reality dating show hosted by Rylan Clark

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Banged Up: Stars Behind Bars, Planet Earth, Culprits, The Curse of Robert the Doll and Little Trains and Big Names with Pete Waterman. From November 2023

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when bad weather rolls in out of nowhere, and the dynamic in the crew shifts when one member takes on a new role. Jealousy abounds when a romance heats up on board, and there's a tearful breakup

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfield's first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After making a mess of a speech at work, Homer tries to bolster his public speaking skills by turning to improvisational comedy. Marge decides to upgrade Bart's tumbledown treehouse, but tensions arise when Bart questions her building skills

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the spoof documentary following the dedicated teachers and the inept principal of a Philadelphia school. Starring Quinta Brunson

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to the Eurovision Song Contest, Bridgerton, Love Triangle Australia, Double the Money, Marcus Wareing Simply Provence, Narrow Escapes and news coverage of the Northern Lights being visible in British skies

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Train driver Dean admits he is terrible at reading signals when it comes to love. Will veterinary nurse Celine help him get his love life back on track? Ex-boy band member Jay and call centre manager Brett reveal surprising truths from their respective pasts, while primary school teacher Richard tries to win over criminal justice worker Jess with a letter from one of his pupils

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to take down his festive decorations after Lisa is traumatised by Halloween Horror Night at Krustyland, but not everybody is understanding about it. Marge experiences difficulties when she takes Bart out to a trick-or-treating party

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Masked Singer, Love Is Blind, Gladiators, Steal, Bargain Holiday Secrets, The Floor and ITV News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Married at First Sight Australia, The Summit, LOL: Last One Laughing UK, Boarders, I Swear, Wheel of Fortune and Melania

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the school dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey, but Beverly comes up with a candidate who surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Adam and Pops get into a huge argument. Allie Grant (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand, and Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work. A resident chooses forgiveness, Jack pleads with Beth, and things look up for the Keanes and Osbornes, but not everyone's happy. Leah has an idea after seeing sparks between two friends, and panic strikes a dad

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers to celebrate Manny's birthday, but he is in the throes of a mini-crisis about getting older. Meanwhile, Phil and Claire engage in a car race, and Mitch and Cameron get sidetracked. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Rico Rodriguez, Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron is delighted when his mother comes to visit, but her presence makes Mitchell feel uncomfortable. Meanwhile, Haley's decision to break up with Dylan hits Phil hard. Guest starring Celia Weston, with Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny prepare for their first school dance, but the rest of the family seems more excited by the occasion. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cameron worry when Lily begins biting other children in the playground. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in fiancee Anna's homeland, hoping both she and her mother will be impressed with his efforts. Unknown to him, however, they are banking on a very British bash

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sandra Dee's, a seafood and barbecue restaurant in desperate need of a renovation in Sacramento, California. His team have just 24 hours to refurbish the establishment, and Gordon creates an exciting new menu by incorporating existing dishes and elevating them to a higher standard. Will returning customers be impressed by the changes?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Trolley Stop Café, a classic Cajun-inspired restaurant in the heart of New Orleans, where things have gone badly off the rails. Gordon and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior with streetcar-inspired decor and revamp the menu, working around the clock with the café's staff, who must learn how to prepare the new dishes and work together as a team. The customers are invited to return the next day to judge the changes

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Shanty on 19th, an iconic restaurant in the West End theatre district of Allentown, Pennsylvania, which has been a local presence for decades. However, its future success is under threat unless Gordon and his team can return the place to its former glory. They have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the interior as a bright and airy contemporary bistro that pays homage to the industrial history of its hometown and recreate the menu, working around the clock with the staff, who must learn how to make the new dishes and work together more effectively. The customers are asked to come back the next day to see the improvements. Will they think the new eatery is a star in the making?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Vasi's Restaurant and Bar, a family-owned eatery in Waterbury, Connecticut, to implement some much-needed updates. He and his team have just 24 hours to clean and remodel the dated interior at a seaside Mediterranean taverna that fuses Greek and Italian heritage, and refresh the menu, working around the clock with Vasi's staff, who must learn how to work together to prepare the new dishes. The customers are then invited to return the next day, assess the changes and pass judgment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets the son of musician Bleeding Gums Murphy and attempts to improve his life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is unable to control his feelings when he gets a new teacher, while Lisa befriends an octopus

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining 11 bakers are ready to rise to a new challenge - bread week. The contestants are tasked with creating identical breadsticks, with an extra something on the side, a braided zopf, and some scored and painted loaves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A surprise from Marge's past has her bonding with Bart and terrifying Homer

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present the semi-final of the baking contest, which tests the four remaining bakers' skills with patisserie. There are only three places in next week's final, and this round of challenges will determine who does not make the cut. The signature dish requires a delicate dome and a perfect finish, while for the technical, the bakers must take croquembouche to the next level. Finally, for the showstopper, they must use all their skills to construct an edible display case

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the final of the culinary competition. As family and friends gather on the lawn outside, the last three bakers enter the tent to prepare a chocolate cake as their signature bake. For the technical challenge, they must master that most delicate of dishes, the souffle, and finally for their showstopper, they must create an edible illusion using only cake, sweet bread and biscuits

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas takes over from Sandi Toksvig as host for the 2020 series, alongside returning presenter Noel Fielding and regular judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The 12 contestants for this series have been required to form a social bubble due to Covid-19 lockdown restrictions. The contest begins with cake week, beginning with a signature challenge to produce a classic Battenberg. For the technical round, Paul sets the contestants the task of making a fruit sponge, and the final showstopper challenge gives the bakers a chance to express their creativity

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present biscuit week. For the showstopper round, they are challenged to create an elaborate table setting made entirely from biscuits, before judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide who will be crowned Star Baker and who will be leaving the contest this week

programme.desc: The case of 51-year-old Diane Fortenberry, who was murdered in May 2011 after returning to her family's home in rural Osakis during her lunch break and catching a man in the middle of a burglary

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: A case in Montrose, Colorado, in which Irene Trujillo was reported missing. Later, her body was discovered in the rock quarry she owned. Those closest to Irene, including her employees, were suspected of foul play, but three years later police were still investigating the brutal murder

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: The murder of a policeman in Higginson, Arkansas. The small town only had two full-time police officers, and everyone in the community wanted answers

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Young mother Casey Morgan is found dead inside her home. Police must unravel her dating history with the help of her friends and neighbours to unmask the killer.

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: £45,000 is donated to help fund lifesaving cancer treatment for 39-year-old Nicole Elkabbas, but a photograph raises suspicions that everything is a lie

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: Wayne Johncock is scammed out of £180,000 by his neighbour, Rajesh Ghedia. As Ghedia's lies unravel, police discover that Wayne is not his only victim

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: The case of John Tanner, who took part in a police reconstruction when his fiancee vanished. Plus, Paul Dyson whose TV plea for his missing lover raised suspicions. Series examining the phenomenon of criminal cases where people publically feign innocence about a crime they have committed, shedding crocodile tears in the process.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Ashley's new confidence enrages estranged husband Terry, who stalks her to a secluded lot, ready to reclaim control in the deadliest way

programme.title: The Exorcism of Roland Doe

programme.title: Evil Lives Here

programme.title: The Real Murders on Elm Street
programme.desc: When investigators respond to a bloody quadruple homicide, they soon discover the murders involved torture, revenge, and even Satan

Thriller from director Paul Verhoeven, starring Sharon Stone, Michael Douglas, George Dzundza and Jeanne Tripplehorn

programme.title: How I Spent My Summer Vacation (2012)
programme.desc: A getaway driver crashes his car in Mexico, leading to the authorities seizing his ill-gotten gains and condemning him to a violent, lawless prison dominated by gangs. A boy who has also been locked up there proves an unlikely ally in helping him survive, and he hatches a plan to escape and recover his money. Crime thriller, starring Mel Gibson and Kevin Hernandez

programme.title: The Internecine Project (1974)
programme.desc: An economics professor is about to start a prestigious job as a government adviser - but his murky past as an industrial spy threatens his chances. His only way of burying the past is to dispose of his former associates, so he hatches a plan to trick them into murdering one another. Thriller, starring James Coburn, Lee Grant, Harry Andrews and Ian Hendry

programme.desc: A gambler plans to win a fortune in Las Vegas by utilising his boss's special powers

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A boy uses a toy telephone to keep in touch with his dead grandmother

programme.title: Babylon 5: The Gathering (1993)
programme.desc: The grand opening of a space station comes under threat when someone attempts to sabotage proceedings in ruthless fashion - leaving the commanding officer in the frame for poisoning the Vorlon ambassador. Sci-fi drama which began the series, starring Michael O'Hare, Jerry Doyle and Mira Furlan

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: The Narns launch an unprovoked attack on a peaceful Centauri colony, and raiders target transport ships near the station

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: A damaged alien craft is brought on board the ship, and the crew identifies its inhabitant as the Soul Hunter, an immortal predator that can sense death

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: Londo's career is placed in jeopardy when an exotic dancer seduces him and steals his secret files. Meanwhile, Garibaldi investigates the unauthorised use of a restricted channel of communication

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: A xenoarchaeologist who was Franklin's mentor smuggles strange artefacts into the station, transforming his assistant into a rampaging monster

programme.title: George and the Dragon (2004)
programme.desc: A knight returns from the Crusades looking forward to a quiet life, but finds himself embarking on a new mission when the king's daughter disappears. He sets out to find the missing princess - in return for some land of his own - but his quest leads to a confrontation with a fearsome dragon. Fantasy adventure, with James Purefoy, Piper Perabo, Simon Callow, Patrick Swayze and Michael Clarke Duncan

programme.title: Mammoth (2006)
programme.desc: A sleepy town is thrown into turmoil when a meteor strikes the local museum, bringing a woolly mammoth residing in one of the display cases to life. The ancient beast goes on a violent rampage, leaving the residents with the task of hunting it down before it escapes into the outside world. Sci-fi thriller, starring Vincent Ventresca, Summer Glau, Tom Skerritt and Cole Williams

programme.title: Moby Dick (1956)
programme.desc: Obsessive skipper Captain Ahab leads his ship and crew on an epic quest to find and kill the legendary white whale that bit off his leg - but his lust for vengeance endangers all their lives. John Huston's seafaring adventure, based on Herman Melville's novel, starring Gregory Peck, Richard Baseheart, Orson Welles and Leo Genn

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man seeking help for his dying son on the New Mexico border is transported 100 years into the future. Drama, starring Cliff Robertson

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Four robbers put themselves in suspended animation to evade punishment. Drama, starring Oscar Beregi

programme.title: A Time to Kill (1996)
programme.desc: A lawyer in Mississippi agrees to defend a black man charged with killing the two racist thugs who raped his 10-year-old daughter - but he is ill-prepared for the racial tension and violence that erupts during the course of the trial. Courtroom drama, based on a novel by John Grisham and starring Matthew McConaughey, Sandra Bullock, Samuel L Jackson, Donald Sutherland and Kevin Spacey

programme.title: Street Kings (2008)
programme.desc: A determined Los Angeles cop becomes obsessed with tracking down the men who killed his partner. Accused of having a hand in the murder, he finds fellow officers turning on him and begins to question where his loyalties lie. Crime drama, with a script by James Ellroy, starring Keanu Reeves, Forest Whitaker and Hugh Laurie

programme.desc: A radio sex therapist helps Hooker and Romano scour the city's singles clubs for the killer of four unfaithful wives, all of whom were callers to her programme. William Shatner stars

programme.title: Babylon 5
programme.desc: A xenoarchaeologist who was Franklin's mentor smuggles strange artefacts into the station, transforming his assistant into a rampaging monster

programme.title: Earthstorm (2006)
programme.desc: A comet smashes into the moon, causing devastating changes to tidal movements across the world. However, scientists discover this is only the beginning, as the entire structure of the moon is breaking apart, threatening all life on Earth - so a demolitions expert is sent to avert disaster. Sci-fi adventure, starring Stephen Baldwin, Dirk Benedict and Amy Price-Francis

programme.desc: A dying scientist and his colleagues conduct experiments to harness the Earth's inner energy that seem set to end in disaster. Sci-fi thriller, starring Dana Andrews, Janette Scott, Kieron Moore and Alexander Knox
